description_long: This hammer features a robust, slightly irregular head with a dark, metallic finish, paired with a long, straight handle that appears to be made of a lighter, matte material. The head is broad and blocky, lacking any visible claws or peens, suggesting it is a basic striking hammer rather than a specialized type. The handle is cylindrical and tapers slightly toward the end, with subtle banding or grip lines visible near the lower section. The transition between the head and handle is distinct, with the materials and colors sharply contrasting. The hammer shows some surface irregularities and textural differences, particularly on the head, which appears worn or pitted. No visible branding, logos, or additional attachments are present on the object.
description: A basic hammer with a dark, worn metal head and a straight, light-colored handle featuring subtle grip lines. The head is blocky and robust, with no visible claws or specialized features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the hammer head and the straight handle with visible grip lines.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the head and the handle's attachment, showing the contrast between materials.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hammer head and the handle's end, emphasizing the blocky shape.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view revealing the top surface of the head and the handle's alignment.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with subtle grip lines and a matte finish.
attribute_head_type: Blocky, solid metal head with a flat striking face and no visible claws or peens.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Visible pitting and surface irregularities on the head, suggesting wear.
